name: Change of Control / Consent Review
description: For M&A transactions — identify contracts requiring consent or notification upon change of control

columns.label: Counterparty
columns.prompt: Name of the other party to the contract

columns.label: Contract Type
columns.prompt: Type of agreement (MSA, NDA, licence, supply, lease, etc.)

columns.label: Date
columns.prompt: Date of the agreement as stated on the front page or in the recitals

columns.label: Governing Law
columns.prompt: Governing law jurisdiction as stated in the governing law or applicable law clause

columns.label: Assignment Clause
columns.prompt: Does this contract restrict assignment or transfer? Quote the relevant clause verbatim.

columns.label: Change of Control
columns.prompt: Does this contract contain a change of control provision? Quote verbatim.

columns.label: Mechanism
columns.prompt: What is triggered by assignment or change of control: prior written consent, notification only, termination right, or nothing?

columns.label: Our Party
columns.prompt: Name of OUR party to the contract (the party that is NOT the counterparty). This is the entity on whose behalf consent will be sought.

columns.label: Agreement Title
columns.prompt: The formal title of the agreement exactly as it appears on the front page or first line (e.g. 'Goods Supply Agreement', 'Master Services Agreement'). Quote it verbatim.

columns.label: Consent Mechanism
columns.prompt: How must consent be obtained? Extract: (a) must it be 'prior written consent'? (b) can consent be unreasonably withheld? (c) is there a deemed-consent if no response within a time period? (d) is there a specific form or process required? Quote the relevant language.

columns.label: Notice Address
columns.prompt: Counterparty's address for formal notices as stated in the notices clause of the contract. Include the full address exactly as written.

columns.label: Notice Method
columns.prompt: How must formal notices be delivered? Extract the permitted delivery methods (e.g. registered post, courier, email, hand delivery) and any requirements (e.g. 'deemed received 3 business days after posting'). Quote the notices clause.

columns.label: Action Required
columns.prompt: Based on the assignment and change of control provisions, what action is required: obtain consent, send notification, or no action?

columns.label: Termination for Convenience
columns.prompt: Does this contract contain a termination for convenience clause? If so, what notice period is required?

columns.label: Non-Compete
columns.prompt: Are there any non-compete provisions? If so, summarise the duration, scope, and geographic restrictions.
